title: Integration Plan
description: Coordination artifact for multi-agent paper writing. Defines consistent terminology, narrative arc, section-to-agent mapping, and cross-section constraints. Consumed by ALL section-writer invocations for consistency.

terminology.description: Key-value glossary mapping concept keys to consistent term usage (e.g., our_method -> AdaptiveOrch)

gap.description: The specific research gap being addressed

insight.description: The key insight or novel observation

narrative_arc.description: Narrative arc: problem -> gap -> insight -> method -> evidence -> implication

agent.description: Agent responsible for drafting this section

figure_slots.description: Figure/table slots assigned to this section

narrative_role.description: This section's role in the narrative arc (e.g., problem + gap)

depends_on.description: Section IDs that must be drafted before this one

key_terminology.description: Terminology keys from the glossary that this section must use consistently

section_map.description: Section-to-agent mapping with citation and word count targets

cross_section_constraints.description: Constraints that span multiple sections (e.g., consistent baseline names)

neurips_checklist_slots.description: Mapping of NeurIPS checklist categories to section IDs where they are addressed
